title: Internal Linking Playbook for Shopify Stores
body_markdown:
## Internal links are the cheapest SEO win

Most stores have orphan pages that never get crawled. Linking them from high-traffic articles fixes that in days, not months.

- Map every product page to at least 2 articles
- Use keyword-rich anchors, not click here
- Re-crawl after each batch

Done weekly, this compounds faster than new backlinks.

Internal links are the cheapest SEO win

Most stores have orphan pages that never get crawled. Linking them from high-traffic articles fixes that in days, not months.

  • Use keyword-rich anchors, not click here

Done weekly, this compounds faster than new backlinks.
